title: Brook and Robin Overwhelm Their Foes
description: On pages 7–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is brook and robin overwhelm their foes.
scene: The scene follows brook and robin overwhelm their foes, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does he know exactly where the attacks are going or something ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: All right!! Go straw hat Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the strength of a world-famous pirate!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's this?! The whole plaza's gone dark...

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: The Noah, from the fish-man district?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: What's the Noah doing flying above fish-man Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's heading straight for the Plaza!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's trying to force its way through the bubble around the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: ... If that bubble breaks... then before the Noah even hits the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the whole residential area will be ann childhood by the water pressure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that ship hits its mark, the whole island will be doomed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who the heck is flying that thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Vander Decken
dialogue.text: No... the Noah shouldn't have any propulsion power of its own!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, it's over!!! It's all over!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we were all crushed to death at once, I wonder if the ocean would be stained red?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head for the ocean!!! Get off the island!!!

summary: Brook and Robin Overwhelm Their Foes. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
